delivery.raw: 主に対面（全開講回数の過半数）、一部オンライン

summary: The English conversation class should focus on meaningful interaction between students and with the teacher. The class will include activities that require students to use speech in a spontaneous manner as well as activities that develop students' listening and pronunciation skills.
aims:
To provide students with an environment in which they can communicate in English
To develop English communication skills with a focus on speaking and listening
To provide cultural input related to the target language
To provide opportunities to converse on a variety of topics and use various language functions
To provide activities that foster fluency
To provide activities that improve listening skills
goals:
Develop English communication skills
Improve English pronunciation skills
Improve listening skills
Learn how to manage conversations in English

textbooks: All materials will be provided by the teacher
prereq: This class is available to all first -year students and is a requirement for graduation.
prep: Students will be required to review conversations, language functions and techniques studied in class to prepare for future lessons and for class assessment.
teachers: ◎ デイナ リングリー

extra.label: 区分1
extra.text: 平成20年度以降入学生／令和６年度以降入学生

extra.label: 区分2
extra.text: 共通教育）初年次科目／国際コミュニケーション科目基軸英語

extra.label: 履修における注意点
extra.text: １年次に必修。１外国語（英語）履修上限年間10単位。卒業にはⅠとⅡ両方が必要。

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－省令で定める科目：外国語コミュニケーション

extra.label: この授業で身につける「10+1の能力」
extra.text:
専門分野に関する知識
論理的思考力
語学に関するリテラシー
表現力
コミュニケーション力
自律力

extra.label: 成績評価に関する補足
extra.text:
Final group speaking assessment: 40%
Ongoing assessment based on class participation, homework and small group discussion activities: 60%

extra.label: 教員の実務経験の有無
